---
id: get-admin-statistics
title: "Get admin statistics"
description: "Get system-wide statistics including document counts, chunk counts, source counts, installation counts, and user counts. Useful for admin dashboards and monitoring."
sidebar_label: "Get admin statistics"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: core/api_reference/sercha-core-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get admin statistics"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/admin/stats"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get system-wide statistics including document counts, chunk counts, source counts, installation counts, and user counts. Useful for admin dashboards and monitoring.

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"System-wide statistics for the admin dashboard","properties":{"chunks":{"properties":{"total":{"type":"integer"}},"type":"object"},"documents":{"properties":{"total":{"type":"integer"}},"type":"object"},"installations":{"properties":{"total":{"type":"integer"}},"type":"object"},"sources":{"properties":{"enabled":{"type":"integer"},"total":{"type":"integer"}},"type":"object"},"users":{"properties":{"total":{"type":"integer"}},"type":"object"}},"type":"object"}}}},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"403":{"description":"Forbidden - admin only","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"500":{"description":"Internal server error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
